data.description: dsad

About the Role

We are seeking an experienced Engineering Manager to lead and inspire our growing engineering team in London. You'll be responsible for driving technical excellence while fostering a collaborative, high-performing culture that delivers exceptional products.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead, mentor, and develop a team of software engineers across multiple disciplines
  • Drive technical strategy and architectural decisions in collaboration with senior leadership
  • Manage project timelines, resource allocation, and delivery against business objectives
  • Conduct regular 1:1s, performance reviews, and career development planning
  • Foster a culture of continuous improvement, innovation, and technical excellence
  • Collaborate with Product, Design, and other stakeholders to define and deliver roadmap priorities
  • Establish and maintain engineering best practices, processes, and quality standards
  • Participate in hiring and building a diverse, world-class engineering team

Requirements

  • 5+ years of software engineering experience with 2+ years in engineering management
  • Strong technical background with hands-on experience in modern development practices
  • Proven track record of building, leading, and scaling engineering teams
  • Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies and project management
  • Excellent communication skills and ability to influence across all levels
  • Experience with performance management and talent development
  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience
  • Experience in a fast-paced, growth-oriented technology environment

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary and equity package
  • Comprehensive health and wellness benefits
  • Flexible working arrangements and professional development budget
  • Opportunity to shape the technical direction of a growing company

We're looking for a senior full-stack engineer to join our growing product team. You'll architect and build scalable features across the stack, mentor junior engineers, and collaborate closely with product and design.
Lead product discovery and delivery for our core platform. Own the roadmap, work with engineering and design, and drive growth through data-informed decisions.
Build and deploy ML models to improve our recommendation engine and personalisation capabilities. Work with large datasets and cross-functional teams.
Design intuitive product experiences for our B2B platform. Lead user research, create wireframes and prototypes, and collaborate with engineers on implementation.
Own our cloud infrastructure, build CI/CD pipelines, and ensure 99.9% uptime. Experience with Kubernetes and infrastructure-as-code required.
Lead a team of 8 engineers building our core platform. Set technical direction, grow engineers, and partner with product to deliver impactful features.
Build exceptional mobile experiences for iOS and Android. Own features end-to-end from design collaboration through to App Store release.
Drive growth through performance marketing, SEO, and content strategy. Own our acquisition funnel and collaborate with sales on pipeline generation.
Design and implement our multi-cloud strategy. Ensure security, scalability, and cost optimisation across AWS and Azure.
Support the finance team with financial modelling, reporting, and business case development. Partner with department heads on budgeting.
Pre-screened engineers based in Dubai and Northern Emirates ready for immediate consideration
VP, Director, and EM-level engineering talent for leadership roles
Candidates who prefer or require fully remote positions globally
UAE national candidates supporting Emiratisation targets
Machine learning engineers and data scientists with LLM and MLOps experience
We are looking for an experienced Senior Product Manager to lead our core platform roadmap.
Lead a team of 8 engineers building our SaaS platform.
Join our data team to build predictive models and analytics products.
Shape the user experience of a rapidly growing SaaS platform.
Drive enterprise revenue across the MENA region.
Own our cloud infrastructure and delivery pipelines.
Oversee all financial reporting and controls.
Define and own our cloud architecture strategy.

Position Overview

We are seeking a skilled and compassionate Dentist to join our dental practice. The successful candidate will provide comprehensive dental care to patients of all ages, maintaining the highest standards of patient care and clinical excellence.

Key Responsibilities

  • Examine patients' teeth, gums, and mouth for signs of disease or injury
  • Diagnose dental conditions and develop appropriate treatment plans
  • Perform routine cleanings, fillings, extractions, and other dental procedures
  • Administer anesthetics and pain management as needed
  • Educate patients on oral hygiene and preventive dental care
  • Maintain accurate patient records and treatment documentation
  • Collaborate with dental hygienists and assistants to ensure efficient patient care
  • Stay current with dental technology, techniques, and best practices
  • Ensure compliance with health and safety regulations

Requirements

  • Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS) or Doctor of Dental Medicine (DMD) degree
  • Current dental license in good standing
  • Strong clinical skills and attention to detail
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Ability to work effectively in a team environment
  • Commitment to continuing education and professional development

Looking forward to it.

communications.subject: Re: Your Application — Product Manager, Dubai
communications.body:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out. I'm very interested in the Product Manager role and would love to discuss further.

I have 6 years of product experience, most recently at a fintech startup in Milan where I led a team of 8. I'm relocating to Dubai next month so the timing is ideal.

Would you be available for a call this week?

Kind regards,
Isabella

communications.subject: Quick question about the role
communications.body:
Hi there,

I hope you're well. I just wanted to follow up on my application — I sent it over last week but haven't heard back yet.

Also, I had a quick question: does the role involve any travel? I'm happy to travel within the GCC region but wanted to check before proceeding.

Thanks so much,
Amira

communications.subject: Offer Letter — Finance Analyst Position
communications.body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I've reviewed the offer letter you sent and I'm delighted to accept! The terms look great.

One small thing — could you clarify the start date? The letter says "1st April" but I need to give 4 weeks notice at my current employer so the earliest I could join would be 15th April.

Please let me know if that works.

Best,
Olivia

communications.subject: Re: Background Check — Documents Needed
communications.body:
Hi,

Thanks for the message. I've attached the following documents as requested:

- Emirates ID (front and back)
- Passport copy
- Last 3 months payslips
- NOC from current employer

Please let me know if you need anything else. I'm keen to get started as soon as possible!

Cheers,
Hassan

communications.subject: Interested in Opportunities
communications.body:
Hello,

I came across your profile on LinkedIn and I'm very interested in exploring opportunities at your organisation. I'm a senior data scientist with 8 years of experience in ML and analytics.

I'm not actively looking but would be open to the right role — particularly anything in the AI/ML space.

Would you have 20 minutes for a quick call?

Best wishes,
Priya

communications.subject: Re: Technical Assessment — Submission
communications.body:
Hi,

Please find attached my completed technical assessment. I really enjoyed the problem — it took me about 3.5 hours and I focused particularly on the scalability section.

I've included a README with my approach and some notes on what I'd improve with more time.

Happy to walk through my solution on our next call.

Thanks,
Nora

communications.subject: Re: Offer Update — Salary Negotiation
communications.body:
Hi,

Thank you for the revised offer. I appreciate you going back to management on this.

The updated base salary works for me. Could we also discuss the sign-on bonus? My current employer is offering a retention bonus if I stay, so I'd need something to offset that.

I'm genuinely excited about this role and I'm hoping we can make the numbers work.

Many thanks,
Oliver

communications.subject: Thank you — Interview Yesterday
communications.body:
Dear Team,

I just wanted to send a quick note to say thank you for the interview yesterday. I really enjoyed meeting everyone and learning more about the team's vision.

The role sounds like a fantastic fit and I'm very excited about the prospect of joining.

Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need any additional information from my side.

Warmly,
Sarah

communications.subject: Re: Reference Check — Permission

Hi,

Of course, happy for you to contact my references. Here are their details:

1. Ahmed Al-Rashidi — Previous Manager — ahmed@techco.ae — +971 50 123 4567
2. Dr. Sarah Mills — MBA Professor — s.mills@university.ac.uk

Both have been briefed and are expecting your call.

Let me know if you need anything else!

Liam

communications.subject: Your Application with Apple Inc. — {{job_title}}
communications.body:
Dear {{candidate_name}},

Thank you sincerely for the time and energy you invested in interviewing with us for the {{job_title}} position at Apple Inc. It was a genuine pleasure getting to know you and learning about the breadth of your experience and perspective.

After careful and thorough consideration, we have made the difficult decision to move forward with another candidate whose background most closely aligns with the specific requirements of this role at this time. We want to be clear that this decision was not a reflection of your abilities or potential — the caliber of candidates we spoke with, yourself included, was exceptional, and this was a genuinely difficult choice.

We are grateful that you took the opportunity to explore Apple with us, and we would like to keep your information on file as new opportunities arise. We encourage you to continue following our open roles at apple.com/careers, as we are always looking for talented individuals who share our passion for innovation and our commitment to making a positive impact.

We wish you all the very best in your search, {{candidate_name}}, and have no doubt that you will find a role that is a truly outstanding match for your talents. We hope our paths will cross again in the future.

With appreciation and respect,
[Recruiter Name]
Talent Acquisition | Apple Inc.
[Phone Number] | [Email Address]
apple.com/careers

email_templates.name: Initial Outreach
email_templates.subject: An Exciting Opportunity at Apple — {{job_title}}
email_templates.body:
Dear {{candidate_name}},

I hope this message finds you well. My name is [Recruiter Name], and I am a Talent Acquisition specialist at Apple Inc. After reviewing your background and accomplishments, I believe your expertise aligns remarkably well with an opportunity we are looking to fill here at Apple.

At Apple, we are a diverse collective of thinkers and doers — people who challenge conventions and push the boundaries of what technology can do for the world. The same spirit of innovation that shapes our products shapes the way we work, grow, and invest in our people. Every role here contributes to experiences that touch millions of lives every single day.

We currently have an opening for a {{job_title}} at {{company_name}}, and based on your profile, I believe you could make a meaningful impact in this role. This is an opportunity to apply your skills in an environment where bold ideas are not only welcomed — they are expected.

I would love to connect with you for a brief conversation to share more about the role, the team, and what life at Apple looks like. There is absolutely no obligation, and I am happy to work around your schedule.

Would you be open to a 20–30 minute introductory call in the coming days? Please feel free to reply directly to this email or share a time that works best for you.

Thank you for your time, {{candidate_name}}, and I genuinely look forward to the possibility of connecting.

Warm regards,
[Recruiter Name]
Talent Acquisition | Apple Inc.
[Phone Number] | [Email Address]
apple.com/careers

email_templates.name: Interview Invitation
email_templates.subject: Your Interview Invitation — Apple Inc.
email_templates.body:
Dear {{candidate_name}},

Thank you for taking the time to speak with us about opportunities at Apple. We have truly enjoyed learning more about your background, and we are pleased to invite you to the next stage of our interview process.

Here are the details for your upcoming interview:

📅 Date: {{interview_date}}
🕐 Time: {{interview_time}}
💻 Format: {{interview_format}}

Please confirm your availability by replying to this email at your earliest convenience. If the proposed time does not work for you, do not hesitate to let us know and we will do our best to find a suitable alternative.

To help you prepare, here are a few things to keep in mind:

• Be yourself — we value authenticity and diverse perspectives.
• We encourage you to think about specific examples from your experience that demonstrate your problem-solving approach and collaborative spirit.
• Feel free to come with questions. We want this to be a meaningful conversation for you as well.

At Apple, every interview is a two-way dialogue. We want you to leave with a clear and genuine sense of who we are, how we work, and what makes Apple a place where your contributions truly matter.

If you have any questions prior to your interview, please do not hesitate to reach out. We are here to support you throughout this process.

We look forward to speaking with you, {{candidate_name}}.

Best regards,
[Recruiter Name]
Talent Acquisition | Apple Inc.
[Phone Number] | [Email Address]
apple.com/careers

email_templates.name: Offer Letter
email_templates.subject: Your Offer from Apple Inc. — {{job_title}}
email_templates.body:
Dear {{candidate_name}},

It is with great enthusiasm that we extend to you an official offer of employment with Apple Inc. On behalf of the entire team, we are truly excited about the prospect of you joining us and contributing to the work we do every day.

Below is a summary of your offer details:

🎯 Position: {{job_title}}
💼 Company: Apple Inc.
💰 Compensation: {{salary}} (annual base salary)
📅 Proposed Start Date: {{start_date}}

In addition to your base compensation, this offer includes Apple's comprehensive benefits package, which encompasses health and wellness programs, employee stock purchase opportunities, professional development resources, and much more. Full details will be outlined in your formal offer documentation, which will follow this communication.

At Apple, we believe that the best work happens when talented, passionate people are empowered to do what they love — and supported in doing it exceptionally well. We have no doubt that you will bring remarkable value to our team, and we are equally committed to investing in your growth and success.

To confirm your acceptance, please review and sign the attached formal offer letter by [Acceptance Deadline Date]. Should you have any questions or wish to discuss any aspect of this offer, please do not hesitate to contact me directly. We want to ensure you feel fully informed and confident as you make this important decision.

Welcome to a place where your work will make a real difference — in the lives of our customers and in your own.

Warm congratulations, {{candidate_name}}. We cannot wait to have you on board.

Sincerely,
[Recruiter Name]
Talent Acquisition | Apple Inc.
[Phone Number] | [Email Address]
apple.com/careers

email_templates.name: Welcome Aboard
email_templates.subject: Welcome to Apple, {{candidate_name}}! 🎉
email_templates.body:
Dear {{candidate_name}},

Welcome to Apple.

Those three words represent something significant — because joining Apple means becoming part of a diverse collective of thinkers, creators, and doers who are united by a shared belief: that technology, thoughtfully made, can genuinely change the world. And now, that includes you.

We are absolutely thrilled to have you join us, and we want your first day and beyond to feel as seamless and exciting as possible. Here are a few things to help you get started:

📅 Your Start Date: {{start_date}}
👤 Your Manager: {{manager_name}}
📍 Reporting Instructions: [Location/Remote Login Details]

Before your first day, please ensure you have:
✅ Completed all onboarding paperwork sent to your email
✅ Reviewed the new hire checklist provided by your HR contact
✅ Reached out to {{manager_name}} if you have any questions about your first week

Your manager, {{manager_name}}, will be in touch shortly to walk you through your onboarding schedule, introduce you to the team, and help you settle in. In the meantime, please do not hesitate to reach out to me with any questions — no question is too small.

At Apple, we know that great work starts with feeling supported, inspired, and connected. Our goal is to ensure that from day one, you feel exactly that. Your contributions matter here, and we cannot wait to see the impact you will make.

Again, welcome to the team, {{candidate_name}}. This is just the beginning.

With excitement and warmth,
[Recruiter Name]
Talent Acquisition | Apple Inc.
[Phone Number] | [Email Address]
apple.com/careers

email_templates.name: Rejection
email_templates.subject: Your Application with Apple Inc. — {{job_title}}
email_templates.body:
Dear {{candidate_name}},

Thank you sincerely for the time and effort you invested in exploring the {{job_title}} opportunity with Apple Inc. It was a genuine pleasure to learn more about your background, accomplishments, and professional journey.

After careful and thorough consideration, we have decided to move forward with another candidate whose experience more closely aligns with the specific requirements of this particular role at this time. We want to emphasize that this decision was not a reflection of your capabilities or potential — the caliber of candidates we encountered throughout this process, including yourself, was truly outstanding.

We will be retaining your information in our talent network and encourage you to continue exploring opportunities at Apple Inc. as new roles become available. We believe that the right opportunity for someone of your talent is worth waiting for.

Once again, {{candidate_name}}, we thank you for your interest in {{company_name}} and wish you every success in your career. We hope our paths will cross again in the future.

With appreciation,
[Recruiter Name]
Talent Acquisition | Apple Inc.
[Phone Number] | [Email Address]

inbound_messages.subject: Re: Senior Software Engineer — Interview Confirmation
inbound_messages.body_text:
Hi,

Thanks for getting back to me. Thursday at 2pm works perfectly.

Just to confirm — will this be a video call via Teams or a different platform? Also, should I prepare anything specific beforehand?

Looking forward to it.

Best regards,
James

inbound_messages.subject: Re: Your Application — Product Manager, Dubai
inbound_messages.body_text:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out. I'm very interested in the Product Manager role and would love to discuss further.

I have 6 years of product experience, most recently at a fintech startup in Milan where I led a team of 8. I'm relocating to Dubai next month so the timing is ideal.

Would you be available for a call this week?

Kind regards,
Isabella

inbound_messages.subject: Quick question about the role
inbound_messages.body_text:
Hi there,

I hope you're well. I just wanted to follow up on my application — I sent it over last week but haven't heard back yet.

Also, I had a quick question: does the role involve any travel? I'm happy to travel within the GCC region but wanted to check before proceeding.

Thanks so much,
Amira

inbound_messages.subject: Offer Letter — Finance Analyst Position
inbound_messages.body_text:
Dear Hiring Team,

I've reviewed the offer letter you sent and I'm delighted to accept! The terms look great.

One small thing — could you clarify the start date? The letter says "1st April" but I need to give 4 weeks notice at my current employer so the earliest I could join would be 15th April.

Please let me know if that works.

Best,
Olivia

inbound_messages.subject: Re: Background Check — Documents Needed
inbound_messages.body_text:
Hi,

Thanks for the message. I've attached the following documents as requested:

- Emirates ID (front and back)
- Passport copy
- Last 3 months payslips
- NOC from current employer

Please let me know if you need anything else. I'm keen to get started as soon as possible!

Cheers,
Hassan

inbound_messages.subject: Interested in Opportunities
inbound_messages.body_text:
Hello,

I came across your profile on LinkedIn and I'm very interested in exploring opportunities at your organisation. I'm a senior data scientist with 8 years of experience in ML and analytics.

I'm not actively looking but would be open to the right role — particularly anything in the AI/ML space.

Would you have 20 minutes for a quick call?

Best wishes,
Priya

inbound_messages.subject: Re: Technical Assessment — Submission
inbound_messages.body_text:
Hi,

Please find attached my completed technical assessment. I really enjoyed the problem — it took me about 3.5 hours and I focused particularly on the scalability section.

I've included a README with my approach and some notes on what I'd improve with more time.

Happy to walk through my solution on our next call.

Thanks,
Nora

inbound_messages.subject: Re: Offer Update — Salary Negotiation
inbound_messages.body_text:
Hi,

Thank you for the revised offer. I appreciate you going back to management on this.

The updated base salary works for me. Could we also discuss the sign-on bonus? My current employer is offering a retention bonus if I stay, so I'd need something to offset that.

I'm genuinely excited about this role and I'm hoping we can make the numbers work.

Many thanks,
Oliver

inbound_messages.subject: Thank you — Interview Yesterday
inbound_messages.body_text:
Dear Team,

I just wanted to send a quick note to say thank you for the interview yesterday. I really enjoyed meeting everyone and learning more about the team's vision.

The role sounds like a fantastic fit and I'm very excited about the prospect of joining.

Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need any additional information from my side.

Warmly,
Sarah

inbound_messages.subject: Re: Reference Check — Permission
inbound_messages.body_text:
Hi,

Of course, happy for you to contact my references. Here are their details:

1. Ahmed Al-Rashidi — Previous Manager — ahmed@techco.ae — +971 50 123 4567
2. Dr. Sarah Mills — MBA Professor — s.mills@university.ac.uk

Both have been briefed and are expecting your call.

Let me know if you need anything else!

Liam

inbound_messages.subject: Enquiry About Executive Roles
inbound_messages.body_text:
Hello,

My name is David Chen and I'm a CFO with 15 years of experience in financial services across APAC and MENA. I'm exploring senior leadership opportunities and was referred to your firm by a colleague.

Would you have capacity to discuss potential opportunities?

Many thanks,
David Chen

Hi,

Someone viewed your job posting for "Head of Engineering" and sent you a message on LinkedIn. Log in to LinkedIn to view and respond.

This is an automated notification.

LinkedIn Talent Solutions

release_notes.title: Platform Launch
release_notes.summary: Initial release of the Vercentic platform.
features: Dynamic data model with custom objects and fields
People, Jobs, and Talent Pools core objects
Record list view with search and filtering
Settings with user and role management

release_notes.title: AI Copilot & Record Management
release_notes.summary: Introduced the AI Copilot and enhanced record management.
features: AI Copilot with natural language record creation
People to Job AI matching engine with score rings
Full record detail page with 2-column layout
Communications panel — email, SMS, WhatsApp, call logging
Workflow builder with pipeline stages

release_notes.title: Portal Builder & Search
release_notes.summary: External portals for career sites, plus universal search.
features: Portal builder with Career Site, HM Portal, Agency Portal types
Global search bar with live results across all objects
Advanced filter builder with saved lists
Dashboard with interactive charts
Column picker and view customisation on list pages

release_notes.title: Org Chart & People Graph
release_notes.summary: Visual org chart with people relationships and department drill-down.
features: Visual org chart with company structure and people graph
Reporting relationships (Reports To, Manages, Dotted-line)
Department drill-down with people filter
Open roles shown as amber nodes in the org chart
Person Type field with conditional employment fields
PDF export for org chart views

release_notes.title: Interviews, Forms & Document Intelligence
release_notes.summary: Full interview scheduling, form builder, CV parsing, and document extraction.
features: Interview module — Calendly-style interview types
Schedule interviews via natural language in the Copilot
Form builder — create custom forms with any field type
CV parsing — DOCX and PDF support via AI
Document Intelligence — extract data from IDs and documents
File type admin with AI extraction field mappings
People field type — link person records from any field

release_notes.title: Offer Management
release_notes.summary: End-to-end offer lifecycle with multi-approver chains.
features: Offer creation wizard — candidate search, compensation builder, approval chain
Multi-approver sequential approval workflow
Offer lifecycle — Draft to Pending Approval to Sent to Accepted/Declined
Compensation package calculator with base, bonus, equity, benefits
Copilot offer creation via natural language

release_notes.title: Release Notes & News
release_notes.summary: In-app release notes so users always know what's new in the platform.
features: What's New bell icon in the top bar with unread count badge
Release notes panel with full version history
Release Notes admin in Super Admin console
Category tagging — Feature, Fix, Improvement, Security
All new features will include release notes going forward

release_notes.title: Portal Builder v2
release_notes.summary: Major portal builder upgrade — five new capabilities for building rich, interactive career sites and external experiences.
features: Multi-step Form widget — step-by-step forms with progress indicator, field validation, and any field type
Nav & Footer editors — configure logo, links, colours, sticky behaviour, and footer columns from the builder
Section Library — 15+ pre-built row templates across 7 categories, insert with one click
Portal Analytics — automatic tracking of page views, job clicks, applications, and form events with stats on every portal card
Conditional Row Visibility — show or hide any row based on URL parameters for audience segmentation or A/B testing

flows.name: New Application Slack Alert
flows.description: Fires whenever a new application is received — finds the linked job, then sends a formatted Slack notification to the recruiting channel.

flows.name: Weekly Pipeline Report
flows.description: Every Monday at 8am Dubai time — counts candidates in each pipeline stage, asks Claude to write a plain-English summary, then posts it to Teams.

config.system: You are a concise recruiting analytics assistant. Write in a professional but friendly tone. Keep responses under 200 words.
config.prompt: Write a Monday morning pipeline summary for the recruiting team. We have candidates in our ATS and open roles. Highlight: total active candidates, open roles, any pipeline health observations, and 1-2 suggested actions for the week. Keep it punchy — this goes straight to Teams.

flows.name: Offer Accepted — Onboarding Cascade
flows.description: Fires when an offer is accepted. Creates an onboarding record, posts to a Workday-style HRIS endpoint, raises an IT new-starter request, and notifies the HR team on Slack.
